sections.summary: Aspiring Computer Science and Engineering student with a strong interest inArtificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Web Development. Experienced inacademic projects involving web applications, machine learning models, andalgorithm-based systems. Good foundation in programming, data analysis, and problem-solving, with a focus on applying theoretical knowledge to real-worldproblems. Seeking opportunities to enhance technical expertise and contribute to innovative technology solutions.
sections.skills: Programming Languages: Java, Python Web Technologies: HTML, CSS Databases: MySQL (Basic) Machine Learning: Scikit-learn (Basics), Data Preprocessing, Model Evaluation Core Concepts: Object-Oriented Programming,Data Structures (Basic) Tools: Git, VS Code, Jupyter Notebook
sections.experience: Collaborated in team-based academic projects,contributing to planning, development, and implementation.Presented research findings and project outcomes ininternal evaluations. Applied classroom concepts to real-world problemsthrough practical projects.
